ai_analysis.quality_summary: Majority of cases lack priority assignment with many urgent situations (domestic violence, evictions, homelessness) remaining unassigned. Several P3 assignments should be P1/P2 due to immediate crises. Critical safety issues not properly prioritized.

flags.reason: Family violence victim facing housing instability requires immediate intervention
Domestic violence victim needs immediate safety and support services
Single mother with eviction notice requires same-day crisis intervention
Robbery victim with housing arrears needs immediate crisis support
Asylum seeker needing immediate accommodation requires crisis intervention
Single parent facing separation and housing crisis needs urgent support
Recent job loss with rental arrears requires urgent intervention
Parent unable to work due to child's health needs urgent financial support
Medical debt repayment does not constitute immediate crisis requiring P1 priority
Single mother with housing difficulties needs urgent accommodation support

patterns: Most cases unassigned priorities despite urgent circumstances
Domestic violence cases not prioritized appropriately
Single parents in crisis situations inadequately prioritized
